changelog: Targets Jellyfin 12.x with plugin version 1.6.0.0. Adds schema v3 precision telemetry, immediate pause/resume/seek/audio/subtitle/session-end events, observed timestamps/playback-rate hints, coalesced progress retries, aligned API-key configuration UI, and the renamed Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTrack package.
description: JellyTrack is an analytics dashboard for Jellyfin. This plugin intercepts playback events, library changes and sends a periodic heartbeat to the JellyTrack server.
name: JellyTrack
overview: Jellyfin plugin to push playback events to JellyTrack
